signals.headline: Germany Inflation Surges to 2
signals.raw:
Germany Inflation Surges to 2.7% in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**

Germany's inflation rate climbed to **2.7% year-over-year in March 2026**, the highest level since January 2024[2]. This represents a sharp acceleration from 1.9% in February 2026[2]. On a month-over-month basis, consumer prices rose 1.1% in March, compared to just 0.2% in February[3].

The primary driver was **energy prices
